name: GHCP-intermediate Hands-on
postCreateCommand: if [ -f backend/requirements.txt ]; then python3 -m pip install -r backend/requirements.txt; else echo 'Skip pip install: backend/requirements.txt not found'; fi && if [ -d frontend ]; then cd frontend && npm install; else echo 'Skip npm install: frontend directory not found'; fi && echo 'Dev container ready. See SPEC.md to get started.'
